# Check ascii around block position

for i in range(28, 38):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][14:38]
    if 'O' in row_str or 'b' in row_str or 'W' in row_str or 'w' in row_str or 'c' in row_str:
        print(f"Row {i}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
